ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of the species (e.g., rockfish, flatfish) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat in which the species is commonly found */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Current conservation status */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Primary diet of the species */,
  "lifecycle" TEXT /* Lifecycle characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being assessed */,
  "year_assessed" INTEGER /* Year the assessment was conducted */,
  "type_assessment" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Full, Partial) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location or marine site where the assessment was conducted */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used for the assessment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team conducting the assessment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the metrics */,
  "rec_cv" REAL /* Recapture coefficient variance */,
  "mean_age_catch" REAL /* Mean age at catch */,
  "percent_attain" REAL /* Percentage attainment of the target */,
  "depletion" REAL /* Depletion rate of the species */,
  "sex_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females in the population */,
  "size_structure" TEXT /* Distribution of sizes within the population */,
  "genetic_diversity" TEXT /* Level of genetic diversity in the population */,
  "catch_per_unit_effort" REAL /* Catch per unit effort (CPUE) as a measure of population abundance */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors that may influence the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_metrics_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the lengths */,
  "comm_length" REAL /* Common length measurement */,
  "surv_len" REAL /* Survival length measurement */,
  "length_range" TEXT /* Range of lengths observed */,
  "length_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency distribution of lengths */,
  "length_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure lengths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lengths_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the indices */,
  "n_indices" INTEGER /* Number of indices calculated */,
  "n_index_obs" INTEGER /* Number of observations for the indices */,
  "n_est_pars" INTEGER /* Number of estimated parameters */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "index_description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., abundance, biomass) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indices_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the parameters */,
  "n_mort_pars" INTEGER /* Number of mortality parameters */,
  "n_growth_pars" INTEGER /* Number of growth parameters */,
  "n_sr_pars" INTEGER /* Number of recruitment success parameters */,
  "growth_model" TEXT /* Growth model used */,
  "mortality_method" TEXT /* Method used to estimate mortality */,
  "recruitment_model" TEXT /* Recruitment model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the recruitment */,
  "n_rec_devs" INTEGER /* Number of recruitment deviations */,
  "n_for_rec" INTEGER /* Number of forecasts for recruitment */,
  "recruitment_year" INTEGER /* Year of the recruitment event */,
  "recruitment_season" TEXT /* Season of the recruitment event */,
  "recruitment_site" TEXT /* Site where recruitment was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selectivity" (
  "selectivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selectivity record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the selectivity */,
  "n_sel_pars" INTEGER /* Number of selectivity parameters */,
  "n_ret_pars" INTEGER /* Number of retention parameters */,
  "selectivity_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure selectivity */,
  "selectivity_range" TEXT /* Range of selectivity values */,
  "retention_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure retention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selectivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selectivity_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variability" (
  "variability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variability record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the variability */,
  "n_index_var_pars" INTEGER /* Number of variability parameters for indices */,
  "n_catchability_pars" INTEGER /* Number of catchability parameters */,
  "variability_type" TEXT /* Type of variability (e.g., temporal, spatial) */,
  "variability_description" TEXT /* Description of the variability */,
  "variability_source" TEXT /* Source of the variability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variability_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_effort" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fishing effort record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the effort */,
  "n_pos_hauls" INTEGER /* Number of positive hauls recorded */,
  "ofl_sq" REAL /* Overfishing limit in squared units */,
  "fishing_method" TEXT /* Method used for fishing */,
  "fishing_area" TEXT /* Area where fishing effort was recorded */,
  "fishing_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the fishing effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_effort_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passes" (
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with the pass */,
  "half" REAL /* Half parameter for assessment */,
  "pass1" REAL /* Value for pass 1 */,
  "pass2" REAL /* Value for pass 2 */,
  "pass_method" TEXT /* Method used for the pass */,
  "pass_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the pass */,
  "pass_depth" TEXT /* Depth at which the pass was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passes_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment associated with survival metrics */,
  "even" REAL /* Survival rate for even years */,
  "odd" REAL /* Survival rate for odd years */,
  "no_surv" REAL /* Rate of no survival */,
  "survival_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure survival */,
  "survival_factors" TEXT /* Factors affecting survival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assessment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
